overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing the player approaching a neon-lit building entrance, passing a security guard, and exploring a dimly lit interior lobby and secure back office. The player interacts with a keypad-locked door and explores a dark control room before returning to the main lobby.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with vending machine and security

events.description: player walks past the NPC guard and approaches the double doors
player opens the door and enters the building lobby

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance and entering through the double doors past the guard

notable_agents.action: security guard standing with arms crossed in front of the entrance

entered.detail: red vending machine with NICOLA branding and illuminated display
two glowing red spherical paper lanterns flanking the entrance
large metal double doors with dragon emblem above and green neon light
stone pedestal lanterns with white light on either side of the door

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a cyberpunk building entrance at night, passing red paper lanterns and a vending machine. A security guard stands at the doors as the player walks past and enters the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception lobby with waiting area and ceiling fans

events.description: player turns slightly right while walking through the lobby
moving into darker corridor area at the back of the lobby

agents.ego_description: walking through the reception area toward the back corridors

entered.detail: white curved reception desk with potted plants on top
multiple industrial ceiling fans hanging from the tiled ceiling
bench with magazines or items on it against the right wall
posters and signage on the right wall near the bench

segments.scene_description: Inside the lobby, the player walks past a white reception desk with plants and ceiling fans overhead. The space is dimly lit with green neon accents as the player moves toward the darker back corridor.

events.description: player slows down while approaching the secure door
player interacts with the door keypad to unlock and open it
door opens revealing the dark interior office space

agents.ego_description: approaching the secure door and using the keypad to unlock and open it

entered.detail: dark metal security door with glowing keypad interface and yellow light strip above
metal trash can against the right wall near the door

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dim corridor, the player approaches a secure keypad door. After interacting with the keypad, the door opens to reveal a dark office interior beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark office control room with multiple monitors

events.description: entering the very dark room illuminated only by monitor glow and spotlights
player turns left to explore the side of the room with filing cabinets
player turns back toward the entrance door to exit

agents.ego_description: exploring the dark office space, examining the monitors and furniture

entered.detail: long desk with computer terminal and office chair
array of glowing monitors displaying data and schematics on the back wall
metal drawer cabinets against the right wall
large map or artwork illuminated on the back wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the dark office, the player explores a room lit only by monitor glow. The space contains a central desk, multiple wall-mounted screens displaying data, and filing cabinets. The player looks around before heading back toward the exit.

events.description: exiting the dark office back into the corridor
emerging back into the lit lobby area with reception desk visible

agents.ego_description: leaving the secure room and returning to the main lobby area

notable_agents.action: person standing near the reception desk as the player exits

entered.detail: white reception desk now visible again with a person standing nearby

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dark office through the secure door and walks back through the corridor into the lit lobby. The reception desk is visible again with a person standing nearby as the player returns to the main entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant cyberpunk street into a secure, dimly lit office interior before returning to the starting point. It begins at a building entrance at night, passing red paper lanterns and a vending machine as the camera moves past a security guard and enters the lobby. As the camera advances, the scene shifts from the open entrance to a dimly lit reception area characterized by white desks, ceiling fans, and green neon accents, before narrowing into a dark back corridor. The movement then leads through a secure keypad-locked door into a dark office illuminated only by the glow of monitors and data screens, where the camera surveys a central desk and filing cabinets. Finally, the camera retreats from the dark office back through the corridor and into the lit lobby, passing the reception desk once more as it returns toward the main entrance.
